subject: Ornate scrollwork-handled axe or weapon hanging on a stone wall, with red flame energy emanating from the blade
description: The art crop shows a single ornate weapon hanging mounted on a stone wall between two red curtains or drapes. The handle is gold with elaborate spiraling scrollwork and filigree detail wrapping its length. A red fiery energy or flame bursts from what appears to be the blade or head of the weapon, creating a dramatic splash of crimson against the grey stone. The composition is a still-life object study with no figures present. Warm amber tones from the curtains frame the cool stone wall, while the red energy provides the focal point of visual tension.
foreground: Ornate gold scrollwork weapon handle with red fire energy
background: Grey stone wall with red curtain drapes on either side
